notes: Fetched directly from incompetech.com (HTTP 200) during cycle-2026-06-29-radio-stations-music and re-encoded MP3 -> Opus stereo 80kbps with ffmpeg/libopus (metadata stripped). Substituted for the brief's cited Bartmann CC0 drone / AFN CC-BY surf because those sources are account/credential-bound and could not be fetched license-clean in this autonomous run; this incompetech CC BY 4.0 dark-ambient drone fills the 'ambient' station instead. Lazy-loaded only when tuned (music default-OFF).
